error.message: The model item passed into the dictionary is of type 'System.Collections.Generic.List`1[Generic.view_PartnerConfirmationData]', but this dictionary requires a model item of type 'System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1[Generic.ViewModel.ConfirmPartnerViewModel]'.
error.detail: System.InvalidOperationException: The model item passed into the dictionary is of type 'System.Collections.Generic.List`1[Generic.view_PartnerConfirmationData]', but this dictionary
